sentences.text: The ext:zcf[] extension adds compressed single-precision floating-point load and store instructions.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:zcf[] Single-Precision Floating-Point Compressed Instructions Extension
Preamble > ext:zcf[] Single-Precision Floating-Point Compressed Instructions Extension

sentences.text: C.FLWSP is an RV32FC-only instruction that loads a single-precision floating-point value from memory into floating-point register rd.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:zcf[] Single-Precision Floating-Point Compressed Instructions Extension > Stack-Pointer-Based Loads and Stores

sentences.text: It computes its effective address by adding the zero-extended offset, scaled by 4, to the stack pointer, `x2`.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:zcf[] Single-Precision Floating-Point Compressed Instructions Extension > Stack-Pointer-Based Loads and Stores

sentences.text: It expands to `flw rd, offset(x2)`. C.FLWSP uses the .
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:zcf[] Single-Precision Floating-Point Compressed Instructions Extension > Stack-Pointer-Based Loads and Stores

sentences.text: C.FSWSP is an RV32FC-only instruction that stores a single-precision floating-point value in floating-point register rs2 to memory.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:zcf[] Single-Precision Floating-Point Compressed Instructions Extension > Stack-Pointer-Based Loads and Stores

sentences.text: It computes an effective address by adding the zero-extended offset, scaled by 4, to the stack pointer, `x2`.

sentences.text: These instructions encode their data source or destination as described in the following table.
